criteria.name: Decision Detection
criteria.description: Correctly identifies firm decisions vs tentative direction. Only logs confirmed decisions.

criteria.name: Context Capture
criteria.description: Each decision log includes: the decision itself, rationale, participants involved, and alternatives considered.

criteria.name: Decision Numbering
criteria.description: Decisions are numbered sequentially and referenced consistently.

criteria.name: Message Type
criteria.description: Uses message_type decision for logging decisions to chat.

criteria.name: Consolidated Log
criteria.description: Posts a complete decision log summary at the end of the meeting.

criteria.name: Silent Observer
criteria.description: Never uses kutana_raise_hand or kutana_speak. Output via chat only.
